rationale: Cross-disciplinary: algebraic topology meets CS/AI. Void black background evoking abstract mathematical space, rich purple-indigo accent palette reflecting categorical structure, amber-gold secondary for theorem highlights, bioluminescent cyan glows for interactive elements.
typography: Space Grotesk (geometric sans) with JetBrains Mono for code — evokes formal mathematical notation systems
hero: Radial gradient from deep purple void to absolute black, with subtle SVG grid pattern evoking a CW-complex / simplicial complex diagram
cardEffects: Box-shadow glow in accent purple on hover, left border accent bar, subtle translateY lift
